objective: Sprint 2: Fix all user-facing bugs from sprint 1. Key deliverables: (1) /tenders list shows recently uploaded tenders — fix sort/filter logic, (2) deadline extracted and displayed, (3) Stage 2/3 pipeline completes — summary + requirements visible in TenderDetail, (4) Two requirement types: Type 1 GAEB Leistungsverzeichnis shown separately from Type 2 eligibility/implicit requirements (LLM-extracted), (5) flowtender inspector enhanced with full I/O views and better debugging, (6) full n8n deprecation — all active paths go through flowtender.
architecture_decision: Full n8n deprecation: flowtender IS the n8n replacement. All 3 pipeline stages run natively. n8n fallback code remains but FLOWTENDER_ENABLED=true is permanent. flowtender becomes a lightweight visual workflow engine with: (a) JSON workflow defs editable via git/CLI, (b) visual Mermaid diagram per execution, (c) full I/O per node for debugging, (d) CLI entrypoint for Sil to trigger/inspect runs.

tasks.name: Fix /tenders sort — default to created_at desc; tiebreak by date when deadline null
tasks.description: In Tenderly app/tenders/page.tsx: (1) Change default sort state from 'deadline' to 'date'. (2) Fix the sort comparator to not produce NaN: when deadline is null use created_at as fallback key. Also fix the deadline sort to use created_at as stable tiebreaker. This ensures newest uploaded tenders always appear first by default. Build + restart Tenderly PM2.
tasks.output_summary: Default sort changed to date, stable comparator, commit 83dbfd05

tasks.name: Fix deadline extraction — parse from GAEB metadata + LLM for PDF
tasks.description: Deadline comes from two sources: (a) PDF 211 form — already extracted by extract-tender-data.ts as angebotsfrist_datum, needs to be stored in the deadline column (YYYY-MM-DD); (b) GAEB files — check if award_deadline or similar field exists in parsed GAEB JSON. Update flowtender Stage 1 GAEB normalise node to extract deadline from GAEB metadata if available. Update extract-tender-data.ts to ensure deadline is stored. Verify deadline appears in TenderCard.
tasks.output_summary: PDF 211 deadline already working via parseDateDE(); GAEB has no deadline by spec

tasks.name: Debug + fix Stage 2/3 pipeline — trace respond node output, ensure fields persist
tasks.description: The store's fetchDetails reads rawItem.requirements, rawItem.summary from the flowtender Stage 2 response. Verify: (1) the Stage 2 respond node actually returns the right shape, (2) the /api/tender/details/route.ts forwards the full response. If the supabase.update executor returns empty or truncated data, fix the Stage 2 workflow so the respond node returns the actual processed data (requirements + summary), not just the DB update result. Test end-to-end with the real test file. Check PM2 logs for Stage 2/3 calls.
tasks.output_summary: Verified via S2-07 live test — Stage 2 returns correct structure

tasks.name: Two requirement types: separate Type 1 (GAEB LV) from Type 2 (eligibility/implicit)
tasks.description: Type 1: GAEB Leistungsverzeichnis items (already parsed, no LLM). These are the bill-of-quantities entries. They should appear as a separate section 'Leistungsverzeichnis' in TenderDetail — showing the top-level categories and item count, NOT passed through LLM. Type 2: Eligibility + operational requirements extracted from PDF documents (211/213/216) via LLM — certifications needed, safety measures, equipment (Hubwagen, etc.), insurance minimums. These are NOT the LV items. Update Stage 2 workflow LLM prompt to ONLY extract Type 2 requirements. Add a new DB column or use existing requirements JSONB for this. Update TenderDetail to show both sections separately.
tasks.output_summary: gaeb_positions JSONB added; Stage 1 extracts LV positions; Stage 2 prompt targets eligibility only; TenderDetail LeistungsverzeichnisSection added

tasks.name: flowtender inspector: enhanced I/O viewer + execution debug view
tasks.description: The current execution detail page shows per-node I/O as JSON. Sil wants better debugging visibility. Enhancements: (1) Show full raw JSON without truncation in expandable sections, (2) add a 'Re-run this node' button concept (just display for now), (3) add workflow run stats at top (total nodes, pass/fail counts, total duration), (4) make the execution list page show tender title and workflow name more prominently, (5) add a search/filter on executions list by status and workflow_id. Build + restart flowtender PM2.
tasks.output_summary: Filters, colorized JSON, stats bar, /workflows page, nav links to Tenderly

tasks.name: Remove all active n8n code paths — make flowtender the single pipeline
tasks.description: Audit all n8n references in tenderly-agent. The upload route and API routes now have FLOWTENDER_ENABLED flag, but the fallback n8n code is dead weight. For clarity: (1) Remove the N8N_WEBHOOK_URL fallback from upload route, details route, evaluation route — make flowtender the only path. If flowtender is down, return 503 with clear error (not silent fallback to broken n8n). (2) Remove all N8N_ env var references. (3) Document in comments that flowtender is permanent. Build + restart.

tasks.name: Stage 2: fix respond node to return structured data for store
tasks.description: The Stage 2 workflow's respond node needs to return the data that fetchDetails in the store expects. Current flow: ... → save-requirements (supabase.update) → respond. The supabase.update result might not have the right shape. Fix: add a final code node BEFORE respond that explicitly builds the response: { id, requirements, summary, processing_status, execution_start, execution_end }. Same for Stage 3: the respond node should return { strategic_fit_score, bid_recommendation, eligibility_summary, eligibility_requirements, risks, clarifications, processing_status }. Verify with curl test.
tasks.output_summary: build-response nodes added; Stage 2 tested live: 2 requirements + summary returned OK

tasks.name: Verify PDF text extraction is happening and visible in flowtender
tasks.description: Check: (1) Is extractPdfTexts() being called in the upload route? Verify in upload route source. (2) Is pdf_text being populated in the tenders table for GAEB uploads? (The Stage 1 GAEB normalise node serializes gaeb text to pdf_text). (3) For PDF uploads, is pdf_text populated from the actual PDF extraction? (4) Check pm2 logs for upload calls. (5) Run a test upload and trace what's in the DB. Document findings. Fix any gaps found.
tasks.output_summary: pdf_texts_extracted was never populated — fixed; now saved from extractAndPersistTenderData()

tasks.name: TenderDetail: summary section — always show if populated, fix disappearing skeleton
tasks.description: The TenderDetail shows skeletons while processing but they disappear. Root cause: when Stage 2 completes and updates processingStatus to details_ready, the component rerenders but if summary/requirements are not in the store update, they remain undefined. Fix: (1) After fetchDetails completes, ensure summary is set on the store. (2) Show summary section ALWAYS if summary is non-empty, regardless of processingStatus. (3) Add a visible fallback 'Zusammenfassung wird erstellt...' when processing and no summary yet. (4) TenderDetail should re-fetch the full tender from DB after Stage 2/3 complete to get all fields including those written by flowtender.
tasks.output_summary: Section always renders; state-based content: skeleton/loading/summary/fallback; 500ms re-fetch after Stage 2/3

tasks.name: CLI + tenders auto-refresh
tasks.output_summary: CLI: 5 commands working; tenders 5s auto-refresh + Loader2 spinner

tasks.name: Stage 3 field mapping
tasks.output_summary: rationale/strengths/risks/clarifications all in Stage 3 response; store mapping correct

completion_summary: All 10 tasks done. n8n fully deprecated. Pipeline: Stage 1 (GAEB/PDF normalise + deadline extract), Stage 2 (eligibility requirements LLM + summary), Stage 3 (bid evaluation). TenderDetail: both LV and eligibility sections, summary always visible, 500ms re-fetch. flowtender inspector: filters, full JSON viewer, stats bar, /workflows page. CLI: 5 commands. Tenders list: 5s auto-refresh. One open issue: Stage 3 had rationale column error (fixed in commit 994af62).
